title: potentilla crocea var. depressa
intro: Potentilla crocea var. depressa, also known as Yellow Cinquefoil, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Rosaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties, helping to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. Potentilla crocea var. depressa can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various conditions.
